title: ALTER TABLE RENAME fails to update foreign key references
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE parent (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE child (id INT PRIMARY KEY, parent_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES parent(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);
ALTER TABLE parent RENAME TO new_parent_name;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE RENAME fails to update foreign keys
